description: Composition Black T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves and brand logo appliqued in rubber print on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Black printed T-shirt from lee for men adds a fresh update to your off-duty wear. Team it with jeans and sports shoes for a casual look. Model statistics The product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
